summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Aetheris Spatial 3rd iteration focusing on Master Agent System Prompt integration and AI Co-Designer structured responses. New AI features working correctly including structured output format parsing, frontend AIMessage component, and Apply button infrastructure. All core functionality operational except rate limiting issue from previous iterations.

critical_bugs.issue: Rate limiting still not working correctly - no 429 response after 20 requests to AI endpoint
critical_bugs.impact: AI Co-Designer may be vulnerable to abuse

minor_issues.issue: Empty message validation returns 401 (auth check) instead of 400 (validation error)

passed_tests: Backend API - GET /api/health returns healthy status with version and timestamp
Backend API - GET /api/products returns seeded products (backend alive check)
Backend API - POST /api/ai/chat without auth returns 401
Backend API - Security headers present: X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, X-XSS-Protection, HSTS, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy
Backend API - Structured AI response format parsing works correctly (new Master Agent System Prompt)
Frontend - Landing page loads with 3D hero, Enter Aetheris CTA, Cookie consent banner
Frontend - Privacy page loads at /privacy with GDPR content
Frontend - Terms page loads at /terms with legal content
Frontend - Product detail page at /product/prod_modular_desk_01 loads with 3D viewer, color swatches, material selector, size selector
Frontend - Footer has Privacy Policy and Terms of Service links
Frontend - Creator Studio (/studio) redirects to landing when not authenticated
Frontend - Navigation bar shows AETHERIS branding and Enter Aetheris button for unauthenticated users
Frontend - Cookie consent Accept button works and stores consent in localStorage
Frontend - AIMessage component ready for structured AI responses with mode badges, sections, and Apply button
Frontend - Quick prompt buttons present in empty chat state
Frontend - Active config display in toolbar structure present

success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All UI, navigation, and new AI Co-Designer features working

action_item_for_main_agent: Rate limiting implementation still needs fixing from previous iterations - AI endpoint not returning 429 after excessive requests. All new Master Agent System Prompt and structured AI response features are working correctly. Minor: Consider moving message validation before auth check for better error specificity.
